zh.lifeSummary: 當Hans Joachim Schröder於1595年出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯文特波格阿爾騰費爾德時，他的父親Hans Heinrich Hanses35歲，母親Gertrude Thielen30歲。他於1635年與Anna Elisabeth Albaum在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯史馬倫格波德費爾德結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1672年11月3日在他的家鄉享年77歲，埋葬在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯史馬倫格波德費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hans Joachim Schröder于1595年出生在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯文特波格阿爾騰費爾德时，他的父亲Hans Heinrich Hanses35岁，母亲Gertrude Thielen30岁。他于1635年与Anna Elisabeth Albaum在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯史馬倫格波德費爾德结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1672年11月3日在他的家乡享年77岁，埋葬在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯史馬倫格波德費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Schröder
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Kurt, Hans, Klaus, Darrold, Dietrich, Erna, Frieda, Gunther, Horst, Juergen, Otto.

variants.name: Schroeder
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Erwin, Fritz, Helmut, Horst, Alois, Ernst, Ewald, Gerhard, Klaus.

North German (mainly Schröder): occupational name for a cloth cutter or tailor, from an agent derivative of Middle Low German schrōden, schrāden ‘to cut’. The same term was occasionally used to denote a grist miller as well as a shoemaker, whose work included cutting leather, and also a drayman, one who delivered beer and wine in bulk to customers; in some instances the surname may have been acquired in either of these senses. This surname is also found France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Poland. Compare Schroder .

nameMeanings.name: Hans
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Gabriel
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘man of God’ in Hebrew), borne by one of the archangels. Gabriel appeared to Daniel in the Old Testament (Daniel 8:16; 9:21), and in the New Testament to Zacharias (Luke 1:19; 26:27) and, most famously, to Mary to announce the impending birth of Christ (Luke 1:2). Used only infrequently in the 20th century, Gabriel has recently found favour as a given name in the English-speaking world, and is now sometimes bestowed on girls.

en.lifeSummary: When Hans Joachim Schröder was born in 1595, in Altenfeld, Winterberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, his father, Hans Heinrich Hanses, was 35 and his mother, Gertrude Thielen, was 30. He married Anna Elisabeth Albaum in 1635, in Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 3 November 1672, in his hometown, at the age of 77, and was buried in Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hans Joachim Schröder est né en 1595, à Altenfeld, Winterberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Hans Heinrich Hanses, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Gertrude Thielen, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Anna Elisabeth Albaum en 1635, à Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 3 novembre 1672, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hans Joachim Schröder 1595 in Altenfeld, Winterberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hans Heinrich Hanses 35 und seine Mutter Gertrude Thielen 30. Er hat 1635 in Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland Anna Elisabeth Albaum geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 3. November 1672 im Alter von 77 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hans Joachim Schröder è nato il nel 1595 nel Altenfeld, Winterberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, il suo padre, Hans Heinrich Hanses, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Gertrude Thielen, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Anna Elisabeth Albaum nel 1635, nel Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 3 novembre 1672, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Hans Joachim Schröderが1595年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンホーチサウエルランドクレイスウィンテルバーグアルテンフエルドで生まれた時，父Hans Heinrich Hansesは35歳，母Gertrude Thielenは30歳であった。1635年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンホーチサウエルランドクレイススチマレンバーグブoデフエルドでAnna Elisabeth Albaumと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1672年11月3日に故郷で77歳で死去し，ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンホーチサウエルランドクレイススチマレンバーグブoデフエルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Niedermarsberg, Westfalen, Preussen, Ger: 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 웨스트파렌 크레이스 브리런 니더마스버그
ko.Altenfeld, Westfalen: 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 웨스트파렌 크레이스 메슈드 브o데펠드-랜드 알텐펠드
ko.lifeSummary: Hans Joachim Schröder(이)가 1595년 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 호크소를랜드크레이스 윈터버그 알텐펠드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hans Heinrich Hanses(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Gertrude Thielen(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1635년 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 호크소를랜드크레이스 슈몰버그 브o데펠드에서 Anna Elisabeth Albaum(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1672년 11월 3일 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 호크소를랜드크레이스 슈몰버그 브o데펠드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hans Joachim Schröder nasceu em 1595, em Altenfeld, Winterberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, seu pai, Hans Heinrich Hanses, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Gertrude Thielen, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Elisabeth Albaum em 1635, em Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de novembro de 1672, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha.

ru.Niedermarsberg, Westfalen, Preussen, Ger: ниедирмарсбирг, крис брилон, провинз вестфеилен, Пруссия, Германия
ru.Altenfeld, Westfalen: алтенфелд, бoдефелд-ланд, крис мещед, провинз вестфеилен, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hans Joachim Schröder родился в 1595 г. в местности алтенфелд, винтирбирг, хочсауирландкрис, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, его отцу по имени Hans Heinrich Hanses было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrude Thielen, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Elisabeth Albaum в 1635 г. в местности бoдефелд, щмалленбирг, хочсауирландкрис, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 3 ноября 1672 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности бoдефелд, щмалленбирг, хочсауирландкрис, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hans Joachim Schröder nació en 1595, en Altenfeld, Winterberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, su papá, Hans Heinrich Hanses, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Gertrude Thielen, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Anna Elisabeth Albaum en 1635, en Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 3 de noviembre de 1672, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania.
